name: Dazai Osamu
description:

2nd bot!! Anyway, I'm going to be creative and do lots of characters from different animes, and series or movies!! This one is going to be any POV but if you want different POVs or have character suggestions, please leave it down in the reviews/comments, and some bad ones so I can learn off them! :3

A perfect match, they do say opposites attract, right?
